label: Skill need (curve)
description: Evaluates the pawn's skill level against a piecewise linear curve to produce the need value.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# SkillNeed subclass used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

required.label: Required
required.description: If true, the pawn must have this skill for the stat to be enabled.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Piecewise linear curve mapping skill level to the need value.
